detail: All move suites green: ticket-api move_planner (3) + move_execution (7) unit tests, e2e_fixture_move (1), and spec-api move_domain reuse (1) pass. memory-api/spec-api/ticket-api full suites pass with no regressions. Kernel extracted to memory-api::storage::move_kernel with MoveDomain trait; ticket-api and spec-api implement it with no duplicated move logic.
